nasb.text: Then the king answered and said to the woman, “Please do not hide anything from me that I am about to ask you.” And the woman said, “Let my lord the king please speak.”

esv.text: Then the king answered the woman, “Do not hide from me anything I ask you.” And the woman said, “Let my lord the king speak.”

cnv.text: 王對那婦人說：“我要問你一句話，請你不要瞞我。”婦人回答：“我主我王，請說！”

ccb.text: 王对妇人说：“我有一件事要问你，你要实实在在地回答我。”妇人说：“我主我王请说。”
